info.name: ggLobby API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for the ggLobby gaming social platform. Covers all ~249 API endpoints organized by feature domain.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Import the environment file (gglobby-dev-environment.json)
3. Set TEST_EMAIL and TEST_PASSWORD in the environment
4. Run the 'Auth > Login' request first to get a session cookie
5. All subsequent requests will use the session cookie automatically

exec: // Auto-authenticate if session cookie is not set
// The session is managed via httpOnly cookies (NextAuth)
// Run the 'Auth > Login' request first to establish a session
// Global test: response time should be under 10s
pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.environment.get('baseUrl') + '/api/auth/csrf', method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) {
